issues.description: HEAD /api/health returns 404 — the health route only responds to GET. Monitoring tools that probe via HEAD will incorrectly flag the service as down.

Health endpoint (/api/health) does not expose memory usage, heap stats, database connection status, or market-data sample prices. Extended observability metrics are absent, limiting automated drift detection.

Admin health endpoint (/api/admin/health) could not be fully validated during this audit run — security rate-limit testing (6 rapid login attempts) consumed the per-IP quota, blocking admin login for the audit window. Admin health metrics were unverified this cycle.

checks_passed: Backend health endpoint returns 200 with status=operational
CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin is NOT wildcard — locked to production frontend
All 9 security headers present and correctly configured
Rate limiting active — 429 triggered at attempt 5 per 15-min window
No protected endpoint leaks data without Authorization header
Uptime ~1.84 hours since last deploy at 17:16:48 UTC
checks_partial: HEAD /api/health returns 404 (GET works fine — medium priority fix)
Admin health endpoint not verified due to rate-limit window (audit limitation)
